query:
SELECT COUNT(*)
            FROM jobs j
            LEFT JOIN reactions r ON r.job_id = j.id
            WHERE (?1 IS NULL OR j.platform = ?1)
              AND (?2 IS NULL OR (
                (?2 = 'liked' AND j.liked = 1) OR
                (?2 = 'disliked' AND j.liked = 0) OR
                (?2 = 'neutral' AND j.liked IS NULL)
              ))
